subject: Science
read_aloud: What sound does a dog make?
hint: Dogs say 'Woof woof!' Try saying it!

subject: Science
read_aloud: What sound does a cat make?
hint: Cats say 'Meow meow!' Try it like a kitty!

subject: Science
read_aloud: What sound does a duck make?
hint: Ducks say 'Quack quack!' Give it a try!

read_aloud: What do you call a baby dog?

subject: Science
correct_response: Yes! Fish live in the water. They swim in oceans, rivers, and lakes!
incorrect_response: Not there. Fish live in the ocean or river!
hint: Fish live in water! Rivers, oceans, and lakes!

subject: Science
correct_response: Yes! Birds live up high in the sky, in trees, and in nests!
incorrect_response: Not quite. Birds live in trees, nests, or on the ground!
hint: Birds live up high! In the sky, trees, or nests!

subject: Science
correct_response: Yes! Squirrels live in trees where they can climb and build nests!
incorrect_response: No way. Squirrels live in trees!
hint: Squirrels live in trees with their nests!

subject: Science
correct_response: Yes! Rabbits live in burrows underground where they stay safe and cozy!
incorrect_response: No way. Rabbits live in burrows underground!
hint: Rabbits live in burrows in the ground!
